channel.title: Posts on x4d69636861656c Hacking

item.title: Hacking Principles 2026
item.description:
Principles

  1. Ship small, ship often.
  2. Prefer boring tech for critical paths.
  3. Tests document intent; keep them readable.
  4. Make rollback easy before adding features.

Notes

These principles are intentionally concise so they can be memorized and debated.
